summary: P0 Features Testing Complete - All 4 main features verified working: (1) Super admin lead creation bypasses round-robin with direct agent assignment, (2) Customer Master has sortable Total Spent column, (3) Rejected leads appear in Leads Pool, (4) Duplicate lead detection shows merge dialog. P1 visually confirmed duplicate lead merge dialog works.
passed_tests: Backend: Super admin login returns access_token with role=super_admin
Backend: Sales executive login returns access_token with role=sales_executive
Backend: POST /api/leads with assigned_to (super admin) creates lead directly assigned to specified agent
Backend: POST /api/leads without assigned_to (super admin) uses round-robin
Backend: GET /api/users?role=sales_executive returns active agents including Kiran VR
Backend: GET /api/customers?sort_by=total_spent&sort_order=desc works correctly
Backend: GET /api/customers?sort_by=total_spent&sort_order=asc works correctly
Backend: Invalid sort_by field defaults to created_at (no error)
Backend: PUT /api/leads/{id} with stage=rejected sets in_pool=True
Backend: GET /api/leads/pool returns rejected leads
Backend: POST /api/leads with duplicate phone returns 409 with duplicate info
Backend: Sales executive creating lead uses round-robin (not super admin override)
Frontend: Super admin sees 'Assign to Agent (Optional)' dropdown in create lead modal
Frontend: Agent dropdown shows 'Auto (Round Robin)' default and 'Kiran VR' option
Frontend: Sales executive does NOT see create lead button (role-restricted feature)
Frontend: Customer Master page loads at /customers with correct title
Frontend: Total Spent column header is clickable/sortable with arrow icons
Frontend: Clicking Total Spent toggles between ASC/DESC sort order
Frontend: Leads Pool page at /leads/pool shows 'Rejected: 1' count
Frontend: Rejected lead appears in Leads Pool table with red 'Rejected' badge
Frontend: Duplicate lead creation shows 'Duplicate Lead Found' dialog
Frontend: Merge dialog shows existing lead info (name, phone, assigned agent)
Frontend: Merge dialog has 'Go Back' and 'Merge Lead' action buttons
critical_code_review_comments: Backend create_lead endpoint (line 3239-3322) correctly checks user.role == 'super_admin' before allowing direct assignment
Backend update_lead endpoint (line 3572-3590) sets in_pool=True when stage changes to 'rejected' or 'not_interested'
Backend leads/pool endpoint (line 3627-3654) query includes {stage: {$in: ['rejected', 'not_interested']}} condition
Backend customers endpoint (line 4889-4913) validates sort_by against allowed_sort_fields and defaults to created_at
Frontend SalesCRMPage.jsx (line 363) uses isSuperAdmin check to conditionally render agent dropdown
Frontend SalesCRMPage.jsx (line 907-929) shows agent selection dropdown only for super_admin role
Frontend CustomerMasterPage.jsx (line 244-265) has sortable Total Spent column with data-testid='sort-total-spent'
seed_data_creation: Test leads created with 'TEST' prefix were cleaned up after testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 features fully tested and working: (1) Super admin lead creation with direct agent assignment - endpoint checks role and allows assigned_to param only for super_admin; (2) Customer Master sorting - /api/customers accepts sort_by=total_spent&sort_order=asc|desc; (3) Rejected leads in pool - PUT /api/leads/{id} with stage=rejected sets in_pool=True, GET /api/leads/pool includes rejected leads; (4) Duplicate detection - POST /api/leads returns 409 with duplicate info, frontend shows merge dialog. Routes: Sales CRM at /sales, Customer Master at /customers, Leads Pool at /leads/pool.

super_admin_direct_assignment.behavior: Bypasses round-robin, assigns directly to specified agent
super_admin_direct_assignment.visibility: Only visible when isSuperAdmin is true

duplicate_lead_merge_dialog.frontend_dialog: Shows 'Duplicate Lead Found' with merge option
